overall.description: A first-person exploration of a futuristic corporate office interior from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring rows of computer workstations with holographic displays, red and cyan neon lighting, and prominent Arasaka corporation branding. The camera moves through the dimly lit space, transitioning from a narrow corridor past a corporate logo and through a dark passage into a large open bullpen area.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate office corridor with holographic workstations

agents.ego_description: walking through the office corridor observing the holographic workstations and red accent lighting

entered.detail: futuristic office desk with multiple drawers and metallic finish
large cyan-tinted holographic monitor displaying data graphs and interfaces
vertical red neon light strips illuminating the wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow corporate office corridor lined with futuristic workstations featuring holographic displays. The space is dimly lit with red neon accent lighting and the cyan glow of monitors, creating a high-tech cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area with Arasaka corporate logo

events.description: approaching the illuminated red Arasaka logo on the back wall
ambient lighting decreases as entering the darker corridor section

agents.ego_description: moving toward the back wall featuring the prominent Arasaka logo and entering a darker passage

entered.detail: large circular red illuminated sign with the Arasaka triple-diamond logo
tall glass wall revealing city lights outside
illuminated poster displaying Arasaka security personnel

segments.scene_description: Approaching a large illuminated Arasaka logo on the back wall, transitioning from the main office corridor toward a darker passage. The environment shifts from neon-lit workstations to a more subdued area with glass walls revealing the exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corridor with recruitment poster

events.description: passing the illuminated Arasaka recruitment poster in the dark corridor
exiting the dark corridor back into the illuminated office space

agents.ego_description: traversing the dimly lit service corridor and returning to the main office area

entered.detail: narrow passage with minimal lighting and dark walls

segments.scene_description: Moving through a dark service corridor featuring an Arasaka recruitment poster, then transitioning back into the illuminated office space. The lighting shifts from dim to bright as the camera exits the narrow passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: large open bullpen office with server racks

events.description: entering the expansive bullpen area with rows of workstations and server racks

agents.ego_description: exploring the large open-plan bullpen with numerous workstations and illuminated server racks

entered.detail: tall server cabinets with red illuminated ventilation grilles
rows of multiple workstations extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: Exploring a vast open-plan office bullpen filled with rows of workstations and server racks illuminated by red accent lighting. The space opens up significantly from the previous narrow corridors, revealing the full scale of the corporate office.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a high-tech corporate interior that transitions from a vibrant, neon-lit workspace into a more subdued, shadowed passage. It begins by gliding through a narrow corridor lined with futuristic workstations, where the atmosphere is defined by the contrasting glow of cyan holographic displays and red neon accent lighting. As the camera advances, the dense arrangement of monitors gives way to a more open path leading toward a large, illuminated Arasaka logo on the back wall. The scene then shifts from the saturated colors of the office hub into a darker transition zone, where the neon intensity fades and glass walls begin to reveal the exterior environment.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic service corridor into a vast, illuminated corporate bullpen. It begins in a dimly lit passage, gliding past an Arasaka recruitment poster while shrouded in shadow. As the camera exits the narrow corridor, the lighting shifts abruptly from dim to bright, opening the view into the main office space. The scene then expands to reveal the full scale of the environment, moving through rows of workstations and server racks bathed in red accent lighting.
